name: Baked Zucchini & Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add mushrooms and cook until lightly browned, stirring occasionally to prevent burning.
3. Reduce heat to low and cook until most of the liquid has evaporated.
4. Stir in salt, garlic powder, pepper, and oregano; set aside to cool slightly.
5. Wash zucchini thoroughly, peel it if desired, and grate coarsely using a box grater or food processor.
6. In a large bowl, combine grated zucchini with bread crumbs, Parmesan cheese, and cooled mushroom mixture.
7. Pour beaten eggs over the zucchini mixture and stir gently to combine.
8. Transfer the mixture to a greased 8-inch square baking dish.
9. Bake in a preheated oven at 325°F (165°C) for about 35 minutes or until set.
10. Serve warm, portioned for 6 to 8 people.
Serves: 6 to 8
Source: "Mountain Measures" --Junior League of Charleston, WV
ed. 1974
